rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Place assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations in component type annexes
Place assignments in component implementation annexes when valid in that scope
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
Do not delete generated clauses if diagnostics report unresolved references to AADL properties
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
